title: Board Templates In Apps
excerpt: Im working on developing an app for monday.com users. However in order for the user to fully utilize the application it would be nice to provide them with a pre made board template. To my understanding when someone downl…

posts.author: jackjack2202 (Jack Kubicek)
posts.cookedHtml: Im working on developing an app for monday.com users. However in order for the user to fully utilize the application it would be nice to provide them with a pre made board template. To my understanding when someone downloads your app you can provide them with integration actions, Board views, Dashboard Widgets. Why not introduce templated boards?

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jackjack2202,

Thanks for writing in! You’re right that although all those other options are available through monday apps right now, we don’t yet support the ability to create board templates. I can totally see how that would be really useful though - I’ve gone ahead and passed it over to our dev team to look into and add to our roadmap.

-Danny
